title: Analytics - Share Data
scenario: Log user consent choice for analytics tracking when Share Data event is triggered, and verify Firebase page displays consent status and screen name alongside default analytics elements.
steps: Trigger the 'Share Data' event by logging in or toggling the Share Data setting in App Settings > General > Account.
Observe that the user's consent choice for analytics tracking is logged.
Wait a few hours for the event count to update.
Verify that the page displays default elements: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment.
Additionally, verify that consent status and screen name are displayed.
expected: The user's consent choice for analytics tracking is logged when the "Share Data" event is triggered. After a few hours, the event count updates. The Firebase page displays default elements (graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) plus consent status and screen name.
